title: cyperus chersinus var. angularis
intro: Cyperus chersinus var. angularis is a variant of the Cyperus chersinus plant, a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting detoxification. Herbal preparations of Cyperus chersinus var. angularis include decoctions and infusions made from its roots and rhizomes, which are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
